description: Reference datasets for AGENTS.md operating contract evaluation — required sections and structural completeness.

cases.description: Complete AGENTS.md with Project Identity, Agent Profiles, Operating Contract, and OBPI Acceptance Protocol sections.

input.agents_content:
# AGENTS.md

## Project Identity

gzkit — governance toolkit for AI-assisted development.

## Agent Profiles

### Claude Code

Primary agent. Full read/write access.

### Codex

Secondary agent. Read-only governance surfaces.

## Operating Contract

- Read AGENTS.md before implementation work.
- Use uv run for all Python execution.
- Never bypass Gate 5 attestation.

## OBPI Acceptance Protocol

Present evidence table. Wait for human attestation.

## Execution Modes

### Normal

Human gate at Stage 4.

### Exception (SVFR)

Self-close with full evidence.
